appDescription.message: Extract YouTube transcripts into LLM-ready Markdown — YAML frontmatter (channel, date, duration, language) + Description + chapter-aware Transcript. Auto-opens the transcript panel.

statusNotYoutube.message: Only works on a YouTube watch page.

statusPlayerLoading.message: Player is still loading — reopen this popup in a few seconds.

statusProbeFailed.message: Could not read page state. Refresh the YouTube tab and try again.

statusNoCaptions.message: This video has no extractable caption tracks.

statusReadyTracks.message: Detected $COUNT$ caption track(s). Ready to extract.

statusReadyTranscriptOpen.message: Transcript panel is open. Ready to extract.

statusNoResult.message: No result from page. Is the tab still on YouTube?

errNoVideoId.message: Could not determine video id (no v= in URL and no player response).

errPanelNotOpen.message: Could not auto-open the transcript panel ($DIAG$). Open it manually from the video's ⋯ menu and retry, or check the [tube2md] logs in DevTools.

errNoCues.message: Parsed 0 cues from $N$ segments — the YouTube DOM may have changed.

errEmptyAfterCleanup.message: All cues were empty after cleanup.

errClipboardBlocked.message: Clipboard write was blocked. Try Download instead.
